description: Composition Black jeans with a washed look, made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has a flat front with two insert pockets, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, comfortable waistband with belt loops, brand patch on the waistband at the back, and a button and zipper closure on the front Fit Low waist Narrow fit Wash care Wash inside out separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade The manually treated denim with the heavy washed look adds unique styling to this pair of jeans from spykar, while the cotton and spandex fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day and stretches well to accommodate your body movements. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
